desc: Ruby Cosmic Dust

name: Topaz
desc: Pure core of Topaz obtained from precious items.  Visit the Jewel Merchant, Edward to exchange it for rare items.

name: Emerald
desc: Pure core of Emerald obtained from precious items.  Visit the Jewel Merchant, Edward to exchange it for rare items.

name: Sapphire
desc: Pure core of Sapphire obtained from precious items.  Visit the Jewel Merchant, Edward to exchange it for rare items.

name: Ruby
desc: Pure core of Ruby obtained from precious items.  Visit the Jewel Merchant, Edward to exchange it for rare items.

name: Diamond
desc: Pure core of Diamond obtained from precious items.  Visit the Jewel Merchant, Edward to exchange it for rare items.

name: Sadonyx
desc: Mysterious red-colored jewel with a white stripe. You will need this to change or enhance your items with Edward. You can purchase these from merchants.

name: Junk
desc: Trash from failed attempts. Make sure you recycle!

name: Weapon Enhancement Powder
desc: Rare material for enhancing weapons.

name: Armour Enhancement Powder
desc: Rare material for enhancing Armour.

name: Soul
desc:
Function - Using NPC (Soul Craft)
1. Increase Soul Force to upgrade
2. Exchange with Seal Removal Scroll.

- Acquisition Method -
Can be obtained by extracting
from any item that has 1 or
higher Soul Force.

name: Regular Enchant Rune Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when enchanting items 
- applies to enchants from +0 to +6
- each application consumes a stone

name: Superior Enchant Rune Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when enchanting items 
- applies to enchants from +7 to +9
- each application consumes a stone

name: Advanced Enchant Rune Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when enchanting items 
- applies to enchants from +10 to +14
- each application consumes a stone

name: Artifact Enchant Rune Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when enchanting items 
- applies to items enchanted from +15 to +19
- each application consumes a stone

name: Legendary Enchant Rune Stone
desc: Increases item enchant success rate of items level 21-25.

name: Regular Soul Craft Stone
desc: Increases your success rate when soul crafting Regular grade items.

name: Advanced Soul Craft Stone
desc: Increases your success rate when soul crafting Superior grade items.

name: Special Soul Craft Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when soul crafting
- applies to Special grade items
- each application consumes a stone

name: Artifact Soul Craft Stone
desc:
Increases your success rate when soul crafting
- applies to Artifact grade items
- each application consumes a stone

name: Soul Craft Remover
desc:
Removes an item's soul crafting option
- Downgrade your item to a previous 
  grade and soulcraft it again
- each application consumes a stone

name: Destruction Stone
desc: You can destroy or initialize socket with this item.

name: Translation is not needed this time.
[Lv.2]1 Star 'Fire Element Attack' Socket Card
desc: A socket card with 'Element Attack'. With the help from [Production Master] Max, you can create a socket to an equipment for socket card use.

name: [Lv.2]1 Star 'Fire Element Resistance' Socket Card
desc: A socket card with 'Element Resistance'. With the help from [Production Master] Max, you can create a socket to an equipment for socket card use.

name: Regular Insurance Scroll
desc:
Magic scroll that protects your items
when enchanting up to +15 or soul crafting
- each application consumes a scroll
- enchanting increases attack (weapon) and defence (armour) values

name: Advanced Insurance Scroll
desc:
Magic scroll that protects your items
when enchanting from +15 to +20
- each application consumes a scroll
- enchanting increases attack (weapon) and defence (armour) values

name: Special Enchant Insurance Scroll
desc: Protects an item from being destroyed during Enchanting or Crafting process.
